text:
<%me>さん！
ありがとう！
楽しみに待っていたのよ。

セグレズンの
締まっていても柔らかそうなこのもも肉
きっとアギニス以上ね！

でも、水惑星にはまだまだ
私の知らない食用になる海王種が
いそうな気がするわね。

またお願いすることがあると思うけど
そのときは

<%me>, you're back!
Oh, thank you, thank you!
I've been looking forward to this.

The thighs on those Segrezun look like they
could never be anything but nice and soft.
I think this might even beat Agnis meat!

I get the feeling that there are probably all
sorts of Oceanids down on that water world
there that I might be able to cook up.

I hope you don't mind doing the dirty work for
me again when the time comes!
